hero.heading: Your Vision,
hero.description: LabelAlly Entertainment is your dedicated partner in the music industry — empowering independent artists, labels, and brands with professional distribution, marketing, sync licensing, and artist development.
hero.trustNote: Serving artists, labels, and brands across the music industry.

platformStrip.heading: Distributed Across All Major Platforms
platformStrip.subheading: Your music, everywhere your audience is listening.

about.heading: A Partner Built for the Music Industry
about.description: LabelAlly Entertainment was founded to bridge the gap between creative talent and industry infrastructure — giving artists and labels the professional backing they need to grow.
about.supporting: We work alongside independent artists, established labels, and forward-thinking brands to ensure their music reaches the right audience, in the right way, at the right time.

values.title: Music Distribution
values.description: Get your music onto every major streaming platform and digital store worldwide.

values.title: Music Marketing
values.description: Strategic campaigns that connect your music with the audiences who will love it most.

values.title: Sync Licensing
values.description: Place your music in film, TV, advertising, and digital media for new revenue streams.

values.title: Artist Development
values.description: Build a sustainable career with professional guidance, brand development, and long-term strategy.

services.heading: Everything You Need to Grow
services.description: From distribution to marketing, sync licensing to artist development — we provide the full spectrum of services that modern music professionals require.

howItWorks.heading: Simple Steps to Get Started
howItWorks.description: We keep things straightforward — so you can focus on making music while we handle the rest.
